Santal 33 Le Labo

for women and men

Main Accords
woody
smoky
leathery
earthy

Top Notes

Cardamom Iris

Middle Notes

Ambrette Violet

Base Notes

Sandalwood Cedar Leather

Santal 33 by Le Labo is a Woody Spicy fragrance for women and men. Santal 33 was launched in 2011. The nose behind this fragrance is Frank Voelkl.
